text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle doesn't have to be complicated. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, even just a 30-minute walk each day, strengthens your heart and improves your mood. Equally important is getting enough sleep—around seven to eight hours each night helps your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Don't forget mental health; managing stress through hobbies or talking to friends is vital. Finally, strive for a good work-life balance. Set aside time for relaxation and fun to avoid burnout. Small, consistent steps like these can lead to a happier, healthier life.
